title: Llama7B mixed/int8 q12-PWL proxy audit
hypothesis: If q8/k8/v8 with q12/PWL reciprocal-LUT softmax passes the native 7B quality gate, then existing measured q12/PWL PPA can be used only as a bounded proxy; because the composed datapath measurement is v6, a v8 composed recost remains required before final throughput, energy, area, and precision ranking.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Can the measured q12/PWL composed softmax datapath be used as a quality-backed proxy for the qkv8_float_exact frontier, or must the v8 composed datapath be measured first?
include: consume quality-backed frontier audit that selected qkv8_float_exact
consume measured q12/PWL composed PPA metrics
consume measured v8 full-value tile metrics as a separate evidence point
report remaining abstraction if only v6 composed PPA is available
exclude: final frontier reranking when v8 composed PPA is still missing

expected_benefit: prevent measured q12/PWL PPA from being silently substituted for qkv8_float_exact without quality proof
identify the exact remaining PPA recost needed after the q12/PWL quality gate
keep the frontier ranking honest about v6 versus v8 value datapath differences
risks: if the q12/PWL quality job is delayed, this audit stays dependency-blocked
a passing q12/PWL quality result still does not prove task-level Llama7B accuracy
existing composed q12/PWL PPA is v6, so this audit should normally report v8 recost required

required_evaluations.objective: Audit q12/PWL native quality and measured PPA evidence to decide whether q12/PWL can proxy the qkv8_float_exact mixed/int8 frontier.

expected_result.reason: The mixed/int8 frontier needs quality-backed PPA. Existing q12/PWL PPA is measured but is v6, so the audit must either reject the proxy on quality or require v8 composed recost.
